result.stderr:
Mercan.PassGen 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Mercan.PassGen
USAGE:
Basic Scenario:
  passgen 20 30
Exclude Symbols:
  passgen -s 20 30
Exclude % and @:
  passgen --excludes %@ 20 30

  -s, --excludesymbols    (Default: false) Exclude Symbols from generated
                          Password ?

  -e, --excludes          Exclude Characters from generated Password

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

  min (pos. 0)            Required. Min Length

  max (pos. 1)            Required. Max Length
